# CommBank Awards Credit Card

## Annual Fee
$89 per year (first year waived for new cardholders)

## Earn Rate
Earn 1 Award Point per $1 spent on eligible everyday purchases.

## Welcome Offer
New cardholders can earn 40,000 bonus Award Points when you spend $2,000 on eligible purchases within 90 days.

## Card Details
- Network: Mastercard
- Purchase rate: 20.74% p.a.
- Up to 55 interest-free days
